entities.name: PIGEONPEA
entities.description: The target crop Cajanus cajan L. for which drought-tolerant cultivars are being developed

entities.name: HAPLOTYPE-BASED BREEDING
entities.description: A breeding approach focusing on the identification and deployment of superior haplotypes to create tailor-made crop varieties

entities.name: WHOLE GENOME RE-SEQUENCING
entities.description: A method used to mine genomic data from 292 pigeonpea genotypes to identify superior haplotypes

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pigeonpea to maintain productivity and survival under water-limited conditions

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: The environmental condition under which superior haplotypes were identified and tested

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENES
entities.description: Ten drought-responsive genes analyzed to identify superior haplotypes

entities.name: CANDIDATE GENE-BASED ASSOCIATION ANALYSIS
entities.description: A method used to identify marker-trait associations (MTAs) between candidate genes and drought-responsive traits

entities.name: MARKER-TRAIT ASSOCIATIONS
entities.description: Statistical associations between genetic markers and specific phenotypic traits

entities.name: HAPLO-PHENO ANALYSIS
entities.description: An analysis used to identify the most promising haplotypes for genes regulating drought traits

entities.name: PLANT WEIGHT
entities.description: A drought-responsive component trait measured as PW

entities.name: FRESH WEIGHT
entities.description: A drought-responsive component trait measured as FW

entities.name: TURGID WEIGHT
entities.description: A drought-responsive component trait measured as TW

entities.name: DRY WEIGHT
entities.description: A drought-responsive component trait measured as DW

entities.name: RELATIVE WATER CONTENT
entities.description: A drought-responsive component trait measured as RWC

entities.name: C. CAJAN_23080-H2
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with plant weight, fresh weight, and turgid weight under drought stress

entities.name: C. CAJAN_30211-H6
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with plant weight, fresh weight, turgid weight, and dry weight under drought stress

entities.name: C. CAJAN_26230-H11
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with fresh weight and dry weight under drought stress

entities.name: C. CAJAN_26230-H5
entities.description: A superior haplotype associated with relative water content under drought stress

entities.name: BREEDING LINES
entities.description: A group of pigeonpea genotypes from which haplotypes were identified

entities.name: LANDRACES
entities.description: A group of traditional pigeonpea genotypes from which haplotypes were identified

entities.name: WILD SPECIES
entities.description: Pigeonpea wild relatives from which haplotypes were identified
